name: pipeline_integration_vague_prompt
description: Canonical vague prompt fixture for closed-loop planning dogfood runs.
prompt: Please describe the relationship between the completed dogfood stress test, the ideas-to-execution pipeline, the self-improvement pipeline, the heterogeneous agent codebase assessment/coding-change pipeline, and the self bug-fixing pipeline. Can all of these be more tightly integrated? This is intentionally vague and poorly specified; treat it as a dogfooding prompt and produce an execution-ready integration plan.
